ability.en: On day 3, Minions become Riot & nominees die but nominate an alive player immediately. This must happen.

flavor_text.en: "Larga vida a la revolución! Mi revolucion!"

examples: Alex nominates Lewis. Lewis dies and nominates Ben. Ben dies and nominates Marianna. Marianna dies and nominates Lachlan. Lachlan dies. All Riot players are dead. Good wins.
